overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit Japanese-inspired commercial district. The player moves from street level through a graffiti-covered alley, ascends stairs to an elevated industrial walkway with panoramic city views, and enters a dark covered corridor. The environment features a distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic mixing traditional red paper lanterns with futuristic holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with Japanese-inspired architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the commercial street, passing neon signs and shops while approaching a large red torii gate structure

entered.detail: circular illuminated sign with 'SPHERE' text above a storefront
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns strung across the street
large red torii-style gate structure spanning the street width
pink and white graffiti markings on the asphalt road surface
various illuminated commercial signs including cyan and pink neon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant cyberpunk commercial street lined with shops and neon signage. The camera moves forward past the 'SPHERE' shop on the right, with red paper lanterns hanging overhead and a large red torii gate visible in the distance. The asphalt street features colorful graffiti, and the lighting mixes bright morning sun with artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered service alley with parked vehicles

events.description: turns right off main street into narrow alley with concrete walls and parked blue van

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alleyway and walking past a parked blue van covered in tarps, observing graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: blue delivery van covered with blue tarp parked in the alley center
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and tags
multiple external AC units mounted on the building wall
elevated concrete highway or monorail structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow service alley away from the main street. The environment shifts to shadowed concrete walls covered in graffiti, with a blue abandoned van parked ahead. Air conditioning units line the left wall, and an overpass structure blocks most of the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with TENGU signage approaching pedestrian stairs

events.description: exits alley back onto main street with clear view of TENGU sign and red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing the purple TENGU sign and parked cars, approaching a concrete stairway leading upward

notable_agents.action: black car driving slowly along the street

entered.detail: large purple neon sign with Japanese mask face and 'TENGU' text
several parked vehicles along the left curb including a dark sedan
wide concrete stairway with blue painted sides leading to elevated walkway
elevated walkway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main street, the camera passes beneath the prominent purple TENGU neon sign and red paper lanterns. Parked cars line the left side while the path ahead leads toward a concrete stairway ascending to an elevated pedestrian walkway. A black car drives slowly along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs with blue railings toward elevated level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with blue painted railings, transitioning from street level to elevated walkway

entered.detail: blue painted metal railings lining both sides of the stairway
tall futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairway, with blue railings on both sides, transitioning from the street level to an elevated position. The view opens up to reveal distant city towers and skyscrapers against the morning sky as the stairs lead upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with advertisement posters

events.description: enters dark covered corridor with artificial lighting and wall-mounted advertisements
approaching tunnel exit with increasing natural light and visible pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered corridor, passing advertisement posters on the walls, approaching the exit where pedestrians are visible

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: enclosed concrete corridor with roof covering the walkway
illuminated wall posters including 'REAL WATER' and cosmetic advertisements
horizontal metal bar railings along the right side with city views through gaps

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an open elevated walkway with industrial steam vents and holographic billboards, then transitions into a dark covered corridor. The camera walks through the tunnel past illuminated advertisement posters on the walls, with metal railings revealing glimpses of the city below. The corridor gradually brightens as pedestrians become visible ahead near the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street through a gritty service alley and up toward an elevated urban corridor. It begins by moving past the SPHERE shop and red paper lanterns under a mix of morning sun and artificial glow, before turning away from the main road into a shadowed alley of concrete walls and graffiti. The camera then returns to the street to pass beneath a purple TENGU sign and a slow-moving black car, shifting direction toward a concrete stairway. As the camera ascends the blue-railed stairs, the perspective opens up to reveal distant skyscrapers against the sky, transitioning from the street level to an industrial elevated walkway. The scene finally moves past steam vents and holographic billboards into a dark covered corridor lined with illuminated posters, gradually brightening as it approaches pedestrians near the exit.
